title: Sign in and reach the admin dashboard
description: An admin can sign in from the login page and land in the admin area with operational controls visible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is shown

title: Unauthenticated visitors reach the login page from the root route
description: This verifies that a public visitor opening the app is directed to the login page when no session is present.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Register and reach pending approval
description: A public visitor can complete registration with an ID image and arrive at the pending approval state after submitting the form.

steps.description: Fill in the registration form with valid user details
Verify the pending approval page is shown
Verify a message indicating the application is awaiting review is displayed

title: Authenticated residents reach the dashboard from the root route
description: This verifies that a signed-in non-admin user opening the app is directed to the dashboard area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Record entry with a valid QR code
description: Verifies that an authorized user can submit a valid QR code for entry and receive a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the QR code field with a valid QR code
Verify a successful entry confirmation is visible

title: Authenticated admins reach the admin panel from the root route
description: This verifies that a signed-in admin opening the app is directed to the admin area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin panel is displayed

title: Prospective residents can submit a complete registration
description: This verifies that a public user can complete registration with valid details and reach the pending approval screen.

steps.description: Fill in the required personal information with valid values
Verify the pending approval screen is displayed

title: Record exit with a valid QR code
description: Verifies that an authorized user can submit a valid QR code for exit and receive a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the QR code field with a valid QR code
Verify a successful exit confirmation is visible

title: Review pending users and authorize one
description: An admin can review a pending user, open their identification image, and authorize them so the user leaves the pending list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a pending user's identification image
Verify the user no longer appears in the pending list
Verify the user's approved state is shown

title: Reject a pending user
description: An admin can reject a pending user and see that user removed from the pending list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user no longer appears in the pending list
Verify the pending list still shows remaining users or an empty state

title: View dashboard status and profile details
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see their authorization status and profile information.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authorization status is visible

title: Log out from the dashboard
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can log out and return to the login page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the login page is displayed

title: View pending approval status
description: Verifies that a newly registered user can view the pending approval state and return to the login page.

steps.description: Verify a pending approval message is visible
Click the link to return to the login page
Verify the login page is displayed

title: View public kiosk QR and expiration
description: A public visitor can open the kiosk page and see the current QR code with its expiration time for walk-up access.

steps.description: Verify the current QR code is displayed
Verify an expiration time is displayed

title: Open QR scan access from the dashboard
description: Verifies that an authorized user can open the QR scan area from the dashboard when access is allowed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the QR scan area is displayed

title: Show the public kiosk QR and expiration
description: Verifies that a public visitor can open the kiosk page and see the current QR code and its expiration information.

steps.description: Verify the current QR code is displayed
Verify an expiration time is visible

title: Unauthorize and reauthorize a user with a reason
description: An admin can unauthorize an authorized user with a valid reason and then reauthorize the same user from search results.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter a reason of at least 10 characters
Search for the same user again
Verify the user's authorization state is updated
Verify the user can be found again in search results

title: See limited access when not authorized
description: Verifies that an authenticated but unauthorized user sees a restricted dashboard state without QR access controls.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a restricted access status is visible
Verify QR access controls are not displayed

title: Search users by name, email, and role
description: An admin can search for users and filter the results by role to find matching records with their status and registration date.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for a user by name or email
Verify each result shows the user's state and registration date

title: Register a manual exit for a user inside
description: An admin can open the users inside view, record a manual exit for a user with notes, and see that user removed from the inside list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter notes for a manual exit
Register a manual exit for a user
Verify the user is removed from the inside list
Verify the updated inside count is displayed

title: View access logs for today
description: An admin can open the access logs view, choose today's date, and see totals with individual access records.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify access log totals are displayed
Verify individual access records are displayed

title: View the admin QR display
description: An admin can open the QR display view and see the current QR code with its expiration time.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the current QR code is displayed
Verify an expiration time is displayed

title: Registration requires an identification image
description: This verifies that registration cannot be submitted until an identification image is provided.

steps.description: Fill in the required personal information with valid values
Verify an identification image validation error is visible

title: Registration rejects passwords that are too short
description: This verifies that registration is blocked when the password does not meet the minimum length requirement.

steps.description: Fill in the required personal information with valid values
Fill in a password shorter than the allowed minimum
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Registration rejects ages outside the allowed range
description: This verifies that registration is blocked when the entered age is not accepted.

steps.description: Fill in the required personal information with valid values
Fill in an age outside the allowed range
Verify an age validation error is visible

title: Registration rejects invalid phone numbers
description: This verifies that registration is blocked when the phone number does not match the required format.

steps.description: Fill in the required personal information with valid values
Fill in an invalid phone number
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Return to login from pending state
description: A pending applicant can leave the pending state page and return to the login screen.

steps.description: Click the link to return to login
Verify the login page is shown
Verify the email and password fields are available

title: Pending applicants can return to the login page
description: This verifies that a user on the pending approval screen can navigate back to the login page.

steps.description: Click the link to return to the login page
Verify the login page is displayed
